svg.title: VPC2 Peering Zone to VPC1 Forwarding Zone to Enterprise DNS
svg.desc: Architecture diagram showing the recommended DNS resolution path: GKE Pod in VPC2 queries NodeLocal or Cloud DNS for GKE, which hits a peering zone pointing to VPC1, where a forwarding zone directs the query to the enterprise DNS target.
svg.text: DNS Peering 不依赖 VPC Network Peering，是 Cloud DNS 原生单向能力
VPC1（企业 DNS 出口 VPC）
Cloud DNS forwarding 出口源：35.199.192.0/19 | 防火墙需放行 TCP/UDP 53

g.text: 相对名 → 先走 search path
